notes: Non-thinking Qwen3-30B-Instruct REAM. claw: "assistant stream produced no content" — model never streamed back tokens for any of 5 instances. opencode: 1 instance hit max_tokens (8192) without any tool call; 4 instances stopped after ~100 tokens of text with no tool call extracted. Conclusion: Qwen3-30B-Instruct REAM is NOT a tool-call-capable model under either scaffold despite having the qwen25 chat template format. Model training data likely lacks tool-call examples.
